package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_buffer_string_len: `len(buf.String())` instead of `buf.Len()`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario446Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
